docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKINNER, RODERICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, ARMAN $5,366.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,476.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, ARMAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SKINNER, RODERICK AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, ARMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
